title: 8 herbal tinctures for athletes who refuse to let nail fungus win
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures have been studied for their potential to help with nail fungus. The tincture contains compounds like alkylamides, caffeic acid, and rosmarinic acid, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties may help combat fungal infections by reducing inflammation, preventing the growth of fungal cells, and promoting a healthy environment for the nail to grow.
